allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match '\\''winget|msiexec|node'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id, StartTime')
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process winget,msiexec -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object ProcessName, Id")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Stop-Process -Name winget -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name msiexec -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process msiexec -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object ProcessName, Id")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Stop-Process -Id 46580 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-Process msiexec -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-Process msiexec -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object ProcessName, Id")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Restart-Service -Name msiserver -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-Service msiserver | Select-Object Name, Status")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"#{i+1} [{r['urgency']}] {r['format']}: {r['subject']}\\\\n   pk: {r['primaryKeyword']}\\\\n   why: {r['rationale']}\\\\n\\"\) for i, r in enumerate\(d['recommendations']\)]")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const o=JSON.parse\(d\); o.recommendations.forEach\(\(r,i\)=>{console.log\(\\`#\\${i+1} [\\${r.urgency}] \\${r.format}: \\${r.subject}\\`\); console.log\(\\`  pk: \\${r.primaryKeyword}\\`\); console.log\(\\`  why: \\${r.rationale}\\\\n\\`\);}\);}\);")
